RichText.Text: 1. put sth. under debate 2. handle the difficult situation with calmness and wisdom 3. do more exercise regularly 4. have sth. in common with sth. 5. lead to specific consequences 6. pull one's limits 7. make it a rule that... 8. beyond one's comprehension 9. be of importance=important 10. long to do sth.=be longing to do long for sth.=be longing for 11. be admitted to key universities 12. It is reported that... 13. It remains to be seen whether... 14. keep calm in the face of danger

TextRun.Text: 10. 渴望做某事（等同于“be longing to do”）；渴望某物（等同于“be longing for”）

RichText.Text: 1. 将……置于讨论之中 2. 冷静而智慧地应对/处理困境 3. 定期/有规律的加强锻炼 4. 与……有共同之处 5. 导致具体后果/结果 6. 挑战自身极限 7. 规定……；使……成为惯例 8. 超出某人的理解范围 9. 重要（等同于“important”） 10. 渴望做某事（等同于“be longing to do”）；渴望某物（等同于“be longing for”） 11. 被重点大学录取 12. 据报道…… 13. ……尚待观察/拭目以待 14. 临危不乱
